acceptance.assertion: A versioned policy declares the bounded maintenance producer set, owning unit or command, expected cadence, success evidence, optional receipt source and SLO; undeclared units are not silently treated as authoritative maintenance producers.

The reconciler reads current systemd state, bounded journals and declared receipts, emits explicit observed, stale, failed, unknown or not-applicable states, and performs no service restart, cleanup, retry, lease release, task mutation or repository mutation.
Repeated equal failures use a stable fingerprint and bounded consecutive count; unchanged failures do not create repeated Bureau candidates or attention noise.

Bureau remains the only candidate and task truth. The reconciler may record or refresh proposal-only evidence only through the canonical intake contract and must bind an existing candidate or task where present instead of creating duplicates.

The Systemkatalog drift watch resolves the current existing-candidate supersession failure with exact candidate-event readback, immediate pre-effect revalidation and tested deduplication or supersession behavior without automatic Systemkatalog mutation.

A bounded maintenance-outcomes.v1 artifact is written atomically with source timestamps, release or unit identity where observable, failure fingerprints, evidence refs, non-claims and a deterministic digest suitable for Leitstand consumption.

Focused and full Heim-PC tests, schema validation, exact diff-bound self-review and required GitHub CI pass; the exact merged revision is installed, the timer is active, one live run succeeds, and the two previously failing maintenance producers are truthfully represented.

approval.note: The user explicitly instructed implementation on 2026-07-24 after a live system alignment. Runtime effects remain limited to installing and activating the reviewed read-only collector and repairing the existing proposal-only drift-watch path.

goal: Implement a narrow read-only Heim-PC maintenance outcome reconciler that derives per-producer last valid run, last success, failure fingerprint, consecutive failures, SLO state, receipt binding and existing Bureau binding from current primary sources; publish one bounded artifact for Leitstand and deduplicated proposal-only escalation without creating a second lifecycle, task, queue or cleanup truth. Repair the existing Systemkatalog drift-watch candidate supersession path as an immediate producer-specific convergence defect.

completion.outcome: A commit-bound Heim-PC maintenance outcome reconciler now derives bounded producer outcomes without owning repair, cleanup, task or lifecycle truth. The Systemkatalog candidate-supersession defect is repaired and live-green; the remaining RepoGround fleet-publisher failure stays fail-closed and is already bound to REPOGROUND-AGENT-UTILITY-V1-T009.

does_not_establish: root cause from systemd failure alone
permission to mutate foreign dirty state
permission to mutate or release foreign leases
metadata.verification_note: T052 verifies the bounded read-only convergence and the Systemkatalog producer repair. It does not verify RepoGround T009, future maintenance success, or automatic remediation authority.

verified_acceptance.bureau-boundary: Exact operator-candidate-assess readback binds existing candidates and tasks. Systemkatalog remains candidate event 572; RepoGround is bound to candidate-0127daa2b9ee7044a4194f3f and REPOGROUND-AGENT-UTILITY-V1-T009. No duplicate task truth was created.
verified_acceptance.failure-deduplication: Stable failure fingerprints and invocation identity keep unchanged runs at the same bounded consecutive-failure count; repeated collector probes confirmed no false increment for the same systemd invocation.
verified_acceptance.leitstand-artifact: The active timer publishes maintenance-outcomes.v1 atomically with producer timestamps, unit results, failure fingerprints, evidence hashes, Bureau bindings, attention state and explicit non-claims. The live projection contains ten producers, nine observed and one intentionally failed/attention-required.
verified_acceptance.producer-contract: config/maintenance-producers.v1.json declares exactly ten bounded producers with unit, cadence/SLO, evidence paths and optional Bureau bindings; undeclared units are outside the projection.
verified_acceptance.read-only-reconciliation: The installed collector reads bounded systemd properties, journals, declared owner-controlled evidence and exact Bureau assessments, then atomically writes one artifact. Its contract exposes no restart, retry, cleanup, lease release, repository mutation or task mutation path.
verified_acceptance.systemkatalog-fix: The watchdog replaced the truncated 500-record broad list with exact candidate assessment, immediate pre-effect revalidation and exact post-registration readback. A durable live probe succeeded; the candidate was deduplicated at active event 572 and the collector now reports observed with zero consecutive failures.
verified_acceptance.tests-review-deploy: On hardening head 78c0eecbefb2b620975d790dbf78f4c2e7a66bd2, 192 tests plus ruff, compileall, syntax, operator-entry and repo-index gates passed; PR #61 required CI and CodeQL checks were all green. Exact merge commit 3b1459084f6702ccd5b14f981bb5fb733733be67 is installed, the timer is enabled/active and live runs succeed.

rollback.strategy: Revert the Heim-PC implementation commit and restore the immediately previous commit-bound systemd units and scripts. Remove only the newly installed maintenance outcome timer and artifact projection; do not alter Bureau history, existing receipts or producer-owned state.

title: Converge maintenance outcomes without a second truth model
